title: Digital Kitchen Timer, Large Magnetic Digital Kitchen Timer with Large Display, Loud Alarm, and Magnetic Back, Suitable for Kitchen, Work, Study, Fitness and Sports (black)
features: 📏【Large Easy-to-Read Display】 The digital kitchen timer features large display digits that are easy to read, making them perfect for use in classrooms and kitchens. With a kitchen timers for cooking, you can effortlessly keep track of time for various activities and tasks. (❗Note: This product does not contain batteries.)

🏫【Classroom Must-Have】 These kitchen timers are essential for teachers, ideal for managing group activities and ensuring that classes run smoothly and on schedule. Enhance your classroom management skills and keep students engaged and on task with these kitchen timer digital.

🧲【Convenient Magnetic Back】 The timers come with a strong magnetic back that easily attaches to any metal surface, such as whiteboards, refrigerators, or classroom filing cabinets. This feature ensures that the cooking timer are always within reach and easy to set up in any environment.

🔊【Loud and Clear Alarm】 Equipped with a loud alarm, these kitchen timer magnetic are audible from a distance, making sure you never miss the end of a countdown. Whether you're in a busy classroom or a bustling kitchen, the timers for cooking will alert you when time is up, helping you stay on track.

⏰【WIDELY APPLED】 Countdown timer extensively use in break time, cooking, beauty facial, gym, sport, medicine time, meeting, classroom... Etc. Count up timer: Clear the time to ""00:00"", press ST/SP button and time will start to count up.
